title: elisanthe viscosa
intro: Elisanthe viscosa, also known as sticky elm or viscid elm, is a plant species native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Elisanthe viscosa is commonly prepared as a decoction, tincture, or tea, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
